display.purpose: Hero headings on feature screens. One per screen maximum.

headline.purpose: Section titles and screen-level headings. The most common heading level.

title.purpose: Card titles, list item headings, modal headers.

body.purpose: Running text, chat messages, descriptions. Max 65-75 characters per line.

label.purpose: Button labels, tab labels, captions, metadata.

shadows.name: ambient-low
shadows.purpose: Default card elevation on feed items and knowledge post cards.

shadows.name: ambient-mid
shadows.purpose: Raised controls, bottom sheets, action sheets.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Primary CTA button. Harvest Amber background, white text, pill-shaped. Used for the main action on any screen (e.g. 'Send', 'Ask Krishi', 'Continue').
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { background: #8F4E00; color: #FFFFFF; font-family: Inter, system-ui, -apple-system, sans-serif; font-size: 17px; font-weight: 500; padding: 0 32px; height: 48px; border: none; border-radius: 9999px; display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 6px; cursor: pointer; transition: transform 0.2s cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1), opacity 0.2s ease; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: #FF9933; transform: scale(1.05); } .ds-btn-primary:active { transform: scale(1); } .ds-btn-primary:disabled { opacity: 0.5; cursor: not-allowed; }

components.name: Secondary Button
components.description: Secondary/success button. Field Green background, white text, pill-shaped. Used for confirm, complete, or affirmative actions.
components.css: .ds-btn-secondary { background: #056E00; color: #FFFFFF; font-family: Inter, system-ui, -apple-system, sans-serif; font-size: 17px; font-weight: 500; padding: 0 32px; height: 48px; border: none; border-radius: 9999px; display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 6px; cursor: pointer; transition: transform 0.2s cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1), opacity 0.2s ease; } .ds-btn-secondary:hover { background: #8DFC75; color: #056E00; transform: scale(1.05); } .ds-btn-secondary:active { transform: scale(1); }

components.name: Outline Button
components.description: Outline button. Transparent background with Harvest Amber border and text. Used for secondary or alternative actions.
components.css: .ds-btn-outline { background: transparent; color: #8F4E00; font-family: Inter, system-ui, -apple-system, sans-serif; font-size: 17px; font-weight: 500; padding: 0 32px; height: 48px; border: 1px solid #DBC2B0; border-radius: 9999px; display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 6px; cursor: pointer; transition: background 0.2s ease, transform 0.2s cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1); } .ds-btn-outline:hover { background: rgba(143, 78, 0, 0.06); transform: scale(1.05); } .ds-btn-outline:active { transform: scale(1); }

components.name: Ghost Button
components.description: Ghost button. No visible boundary until pressed. Harvest Amber text.
components.css: .ds-btn-ghost { background: transparent; color: #8F4E00; font-family: Inter, system-ui, -apple-system, sans-serif; font-size: 17px; font-weight: 500; padding: 0 16px; height: 48px; border: none; border-radius: 9999px; display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 6px; cursor: pointer; transition: background 0.2s ease; } .ds-btn-ghost:hover { background: rgba(143, 78, 0, 0.08); }

components.name: Destructive Button
components.description: Destructive action button. Alert Red background, white text. Used for delete, remove, or irreversible actions.
components.css: .ds-btn-destructive { background: #BA1A1A; color: #FFFFFF; font-family: Inter, system-ui, -apple-system, sans-serif; font-size: 17px; font-weight: 500; padding: 0 32px; height: 48px; border: none; border-radius: 9999px; display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 6px; cursor: pointer; transition: transform 0.2s cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1), opacity 0.2s ease; } .ds-btn-destructive:hover { transform: scale(1.05); } .ds-btn-destructive:active { transform: scale(1); }

components.name: Text Input
components.description: Standard text input. Warm Surface background (#F5F3EE), 12px radius, Harvest Amber focus glow. Used for form fields and chat input.
components.html: <input class="ds-input" placeholder="Ask me anything about farming..." />
components.css: .ds-input { background: #F5F3EE; color: #1B1C19; font-family: Inter, system-ui, -apple-system, sans-serif; font-size: 16px; font-weight: 400; padding: 0 16px; height: 48px; border: 1px solid transparent; border-radius: 12px; outline: none; width: 100%; box-sizing: border-box; transition: border-color 0.2s ease, box-shadow 0.2s ease; } .ds-input::placeholder { color: #554336; } .ds-input:focus { border-color: #8F4E00; box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgba(143, 78, 0, 0.12); } .ds-input:disabled { opacity: 0.5; cursor: not-allowed; }

components.name: Card Container
components.description: Default card container. White background, 12px radius, ambient-low shadow. Used for knowledge posts, feed items, and content cards.
components.html:
Card Title

Card description or content goes here.
components.css: .ds-card { background: #FFFFFF; border-radius: 12px; box-shadow: 0 2px 8px rgba(0,0,0,0.06); overflow: hidden; }

components.name: Pill Chip
components.description: Pill chip for filter/tag selection. Full rounded, Harvest Amber tint when selected, Warm Surface when unselected.
components.css: .ds-chip { background: #F5F3EE; color: #554336; font-family: Inter, system-ui, -apple-system, sans-serif; font-size: 13px; font-weight: 500; padding: 6px 14px; border-radius: 9999px; display: inline-flex; align-items: center; cursor: pointer; transition: background 0.2s ease; } .ds-chip-selected { background: rgba(143, 78, 0, 0.12); color: #8F4E00; }

components.name: Voice Button
components.description: Signature voice input button. Large pill, Harvest Amber at idle, Amber Glow when recording with pulsing concentric rings. The primary input affordance.
components.html: <button class="ds-voice-btn"><svg width="24" height="24" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><path d="M12 2a3 3 0 0 0-3 3v7a3 3 0 0 0 6 0V5a3 3 0 0 0-3-3Z"/><path d="M19 10v2a7 7 0 0 1-14 0v-2"/><line x1="12" y1="19" x2="12" y2="22"/></svg></button>
components.css: .ds-voice-btn { position: relative; background: #8F4E00; color: #FFFFFF; width: 64px; height: 64px; border: none; border-radius: 9999px; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; cursor: pointer; transition: background 0.3s ease, transform 0.2s ease; } .ds-voice-btn::before { content: ''; position: absolute; inset: -8px; border-radius: 9999px; background: rgba(255, 153, 51, 0.16); z-index: -1; animation: pulse-ring 2s ease-in-out infinite; } .ds-voice-btn::after { content: ''; position: absolute; inset: -16px; border-radius: 9999px; background: rgba(255, 153, 51, 0.08); z-index: -2; animation: pulse-ring 2s ease-in-out 0.5s infinite; } @keyframes pulse-ring { 0%, 100% { transform: scale(1); opacity: 0.6; } 50% { transform: scale(1.15); opacity: 0.2; } } .ds-voice-btn:active { background: #FF9933; transform: scale(1.05); }

narrative.overview:
A design system rooted in the warmth of Indian soil and the clarity of morning light over a ready harvest. Amber, green, and warm neutrals create an interface that feels like trusted advice from someone who knows the land — authoritative without being cold, modern without being sterile.

The system is tactile and warm: generously rounded controls (24px+ on buttons), gentle spring animations on interaction, matte-like surfaces rendered in a warm off-white (#FBF9F4) that avoids the clinical feel of pure white. Depth comes through tonal layering with subtle shadows reserved for interactive states. An earthy-yet-modern agricultural tool — not a corporate dashboard, not a playful game, not a cold fintech product.
keyCharacteristics: Voice-first interaction design with large, high-contrast touch targets (48pt minimum)
Warm amber/orange primary anchored by a confident green secondary
Generous rounded corners throughout — pill-shaped buttons, softly curved containers
Single-family typography (Inter) at high weights for legibility in bright outdoor light
Offline-resilient patterns with clear connectivity states and skeleton loading
Reduced motion respected — all animations degrade to crossfade or instant transitions

rules.name: The One Hue Rule
rules.body: Never use a color from outside this palette unless it's data visualization. All accent colors pull toward amber or green; stray blues, purples, or pinks break the warm-coherent field.

rules.name: The Contrast Rule
rules.body: Body text (#1B1C19) on body background (#FBF9F4) achieves ~12:1 contrast. Never drop below 4.5:1 for body text.

rules.name: The Minimum 16 Rule
rules.body: No body text below 16px. Captions and labels may use 13px only at high weight (500). 12px is reserved for purely decorative metadata.

rules.name: The Large Touch Rule
rules.body: All interactive text is backed by a touch target of at least 48pt.

rules.name: The Surface-Over-Shadow Rule
rules.body: Prefer tonal separation over box-shadow. Shadows are for motion state, not static hierarchy.

dos: Use Harvest Amber (#8F4E00) as the single primary accent on CTA buttons, active tabs, and selected states.
Pair primary actions with Field Green (#056E00) for success/completion signals.
Use the tonal surface scale for structural depth. Two surfaces at different lightness need no shadow.
Use Inter at high weights (700-800) for headings. Legibility in outdoor light requires weight, not size.
Keep body text at #1B1C19 (Ink) on #FBF9F4 (Warm Cream). This is ~12:1 contrast.
Provide icon + label on every tab and primary action.
Respect reduced motion: collapse all animations to instant crossfade.
Ensure the voice button is visually prominent — it's the primary input affordance.
donts: Use light gray text on tinted backgrounds. Text must meet 4.5:1 minimum.
Use blue-heavy palettes or corporate navy tones.
Use gradient text (background-clip: text with gradient).
Use the hero-metric template (big number, small label, supporting stats).
Use identically sized cards in a uniform grid with icon + heading + text.
Use numbered section markers (01 / 02 / 03) as decorative scaffolding.
Use uppercase tracked eyebrows above every section.
